prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约431名、346名、550名、438名、890名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年位次大幅后移至890名，较2024年后移约452名，为近五年最大降幅；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为25人，2024年增至27人，2025年增至30人，2026年进一步扩招至33人，较2025年扩招3人（+10%），扩招使竞争略有缓解，但位次仍受其他因素影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属北京大学，985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名北京大学位列第2名（2026年），属全国顶尖学府层次；2026年高考周期内北京大学声誉评价偏负面，但抖音热度排名总榜第3（高热），短视频曝光量极高；2025年曾出现湖北提前批招生空档等信号，但整体报考关注度仍处高位；北京大学医学部拥有临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+等一批A级及以上学科，学科实力稳居全国医学院校前列。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会报考热度居高不下；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增长约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年扩招10%的缓解效应、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%带来的竞争加剧、医学类专业持续高热的社会热度，以及北京大学医学部顶尖学科实力的强吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年890名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约950名，波动区间842–1058名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（五年制）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 基础医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学（六年制本硕连读）
- 预防医学（七年制本硕连读）
- 英语（医学英语）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间842–1058名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档王牌专业（口腔/临床八年制）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业作为稳妥保底选择；位次明显优于区间下限时可重点冲击一档本博连读专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were approximately 431, 346, 550, 438, and 890 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. In 2025, the ranking significantly dropped to 890, a decline of about 452 places from 2024, marking the largest decrease in five years. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province was 25 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 27 in 2024, 30 in 2025, and further expanded to 33 in 2026, an increase of 3 students (+10%) compared to 2025. This expansion slightly eases competition, but rankings are still influenced by other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: Institution Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. According to the Soft Science University Ranking, Peking University ranks 2nd in China (2026), placing it among the top-tier institutions nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Peking University's reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, but it ranked 3rd in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure. In 2025, there were signals such as vacancies in early admission in Hubei, but overall application attention remains high. Peking University Health Science Center boasts disciplines such as Clinical Medicine (A), Stomatology (A), Basic Medicine (A), Pharmacy (A+), and Nursing (A+), with its academic strength firmly among the top medical schools nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have remained highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with sustained high social application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination applicants in Shandong Province is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from approximately 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in rankings in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 10% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from a 5.7% increase in total candidates in Shandong Province, the sustained high social popularity of medical majors, and the strong appeal of Peking University Health Science Center's top-tier academic strength, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to decline slightly from the 2025 ranking of 890. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 950, with a fluctuation range of 842 to 1058.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Stomatology (Eight-Year MD Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Basic Medicine (Eight-Year MD Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Six-Year Master's Program)
- Preventive Medicine (Seven-Year Master's Program)
- English (Medical English)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 842 to 1058, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the primary application direction. Tier 1 flagship majors (Stomatology/Clinical Medicine Eight-Year MD Programs) can be targeted as reach goals, while Tier 3 majors serve as safe backup choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can prioritize aiming for Tier 1 MD programs.
